name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality】M62157 Apricot 👏👏This Capucines Compact wallet is made of flexible Taurillon leather, offering multiple functions and ample capacity to hold daily essentials. This elegant and compact wallet features a two-fold flap design that cleverly provides ample space for credit cards, coins, and bills. Dimensions: 13.5x9.0x2.0cm. 🎁.
